summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected. Eight hydrated open PRs are kept as non-mutating related backlog items because they remain blocked by proof/review/check evidence. Seventeen listed candidates could not be classified from live state because the preflight artifact has unavailable state from GitHub API rate limits.
